files.patch:
@@ -1,36 +1,20 @@
+version: 2
+
 run:
   timeout: 5m
 
 linters:
   enable:
     - errcheck
-    - gosimple
     - govet
     - staticcheck
     - ineffassign
-    - typecheck
-    - revive
-    - gofumpt
-    - gci
     - unconvert
     - unused
     - misspell
     - prealloc
 
-linters-settings:
-  gofumpt:
-    extra-rules: true
-  gci:
-    custom-order: true
-    sections:
-      - standard
-      - default
-      - blank
-      - dot
-  revive:
-    rules:
-      - name: exported
-        disabled: true
+linters-settings: {}
 
 issues:
   exclude-use-default: false
